meaning: n.蒸馏,蒸馏法,蒸馏物,精华,精髓
examples: The Arabs are usually accredited with the discovery of distillation.
Any faults in the original cider stood out sharply after distillation.
Art is the distillation of life.
The book is a distillation of 5, 000 pages of text and more than 800 watercolors.
Traditional oil production and distillation are far more efficient than they have ever been.
